task_completion.description: Verify that the sumo-gui application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sumo-gui window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the visualization settings dialog is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for 'View Settings' or 'Edit Visualisation' is open over the sumo-gui main window.

task_completion.description: Verify the street coloring scheme is changed to the required occupancy setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the View Settings dialog, under the Streets/Edges tab, the 'Color by' dropdown or setting is explicitly set to 'by current occupancy (lanewise, brutto)'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the simulation has been started and the coloring is applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The simulation time (usually at the top toolbar) is greater than 0, the play button is toggled, and the streets in the network display varying colors representing traffic density/occupancy.

task_completion.description: Verify that the screenshot of the visualization is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window shows a screenshot command (like 'scrot /home/ga/SUMO_Output/occupancy_coloring.png') executing successfully, or a file manager/image viewer shows the 'occupancy_coloring.png' file existing in the '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/' directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the sumo-gui application to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the sumo-gui interface and its settings dialogs being manipulated, rather than just text editors modifying configuration files to bypass GUI interaction.

integrity.description: Ensure the output file is a genuine screenshot of the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the final image is opened or previewed, it should clearly show the sumo-gui interface with the colored road network, not a blank image, text file, or unrelated picture.

integrity.description: Ensure the Bologna Pasubio scenario is actually loaded in sumo-gui.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sumo-gui window should display a complex, real-world road network (Bologna Pasubio) rather than an empty grid or a default blank project.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires interacting with the 'bologna_pasubio' scenario in sumo-gui. The agent must save the final screenshot exactly to the path '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/occupancy_coloring.png'.
